summary:
The primary causative organisms identified for bacterial endocarditis include members of the Viridans group; specifically, Streptococcus viridans fits within those criteria provided by the available choices. Therefore, the correct choice aligns with established medical knowledge regarding etiology. 

\(\boxed{\text{Streptococcus viridans}}\)
